name: Medium Armor Master
summary: You have practiced moving in medium armor to gain the following benefits:

documentBlocks.text: You have practiced moving in medium armor to gain the following benefits:

items: Wearing medium armor doesn't impose disadvantage on your Dexterity (Stealth) checks.
When you wear medium armor, you can add 3, rather than 2, to your AC if you have a Dexterity of 16 or higher.

highlights: Wearing medium armor doesn't impose disadvantage on your Dexterity (Stealth) checks.
When you wear medium armor, you can add 3, rather than 2, to your AC if you have a Dexterity of 16 or higher.
